spec_match.rationale: Excellent comparative layout showing default wrap alongside balanced tag clouds.

interactive.rationale: Great interactive tag counters. Employs getBoundingClientRect inside requestAnimationFrame to measure the precise row wrapping differences and displays them inside stat boxes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly demonstrates how wrapping clouds distribute items with category indicators.

edge_cases.rationale: Tests dynamic lists from 1 to 18 tags.

references.rationale: The see also section now includes the mandatory chromestatus.com/feature/4547107962486784 reference link.

design_system.rationale: Distinct tag categories (cat-tech, cat-design, cat-data, cat-ops) using high-contrast colors.

summary: The tag-cloud is an excellent, analytical widget displaying exact row wrap counts and now includes the required ChromeStatus reference.
